recommendations.title: Force Majeure
recommendations.overview: While holidaying in the French Alps, a Swedish family deals with acts of cowardliness as an avalanche breaks out.

recommendations.title: Involuntary
recommendations.overview: In several unrelated stories, the consequences of putting one's foot down – or failing to do so – are explored.

recommendations.title: The Square
recommendations.overview: A prestigious Stockholm museum's chief art curator finds himself in times of both professional and personal crisis as he attempts to set up a controversial new exhibit.

recommendations.title: Play
recommendations.overview: In central Gothenburg, Sweden, a group of boys, aged 12-14, robbed other children on about 40 occasions between 2006 and 2008. The thieves used an elaborate scheme called the 'little brother number' or 'brother trick', involving advanced role-play an

recommendations.title: Swept Away
recommendations.overview: A spoiled rich woman and a brutish Communist deckhand become stranded alone on a desert island after venturing away from their cruise.

recommendations.title: L'Atalante
recommendations.overview: Newly married couple Juliette and ship captain Jean struggle through marriage as they travel on the L'Atalante along with the captain's first mate and a cabin boy.

recommendations.title: The Naked Island
recommendations.overview: A family of four are the sole inhabitants of a small island, where they struggle each day to irrigate their crops.

recommendations.title: The Lost Weekend
recommendations.overview: Longtime alcoholic Don Birnam has been sober for ten days and appears to be over the worst... but his craving has just become more insidious. Evading a country weekend planned by his brother and girlfriend, he begins a four-day bender that just might

recommendations.title: Send Help
recommendations.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

recommendations.title: Hotel Transylvania 3: Summer Vacation
recommendations.overview: Dracula, Mavis, Johnny and the rest of the Drac Pack take a vacation on a luxury Monster Cruise Ship, where Dracula falls in love with the ship’s captain, Ericka, who’s secretly a descendant of Abraham Van Helsing, the notorious monster slayer.
